title: Aeronautics:Addition
description: This mod makes Create’s Mechanical Arm use world-space range and targeting logic in Sable dynamic structures, so its reach matches the actual physical workspace more closely.
body: Aeronautics Addition improves how Create components behave inside Sable dynamic structures. It makes the Mechanical Arm evaluate target range and orientation in world space, preventing local-coordinate reach errors after structures move or rotate, resulting in more stable and intuitive behavior in dynamic physical environments.
